title: rubus callosus var. radula
intro: Rubus callosus var. radula, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Rubus callosus var. radula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable resource for holistic health practices.
